rules.title: Rules
rules.pageSubtitle: How to earn points and win prizes
rules.intro: Welcome to the prediction game! Earn points by correctly predicting match scores throughout the 2026 international football tournament. The more accurate your predictions, the more points you score. Bonus points are awarded for correctly predicting group standings.

scoring.title: Scoring System
scoring.description: Points are awarded based on how accurate your prediction is
scoring.correctOutcomeDesc: Predict the winner (or draw) but not exact score

example.title: How Points Work — Example
example.description: See how scoring applies to a real match scenario

stages.title: Tournament Stage Multipliers
stages.description: Points are multiplied based on the tournament stage — knockout rounds are worth more!

groupBonus.title: Group Position Bonus
groupBonus.description: If your match predictions result in the correct final group standings, you earn bonus points automatically — no extra action needed!
groupBonus.maxText: {{perGroup}} pts per group × 12 groups = {{total}} bonus points
groupBonus.tiebreakerNote: Your predicted standings are calculated from your match score predictions following official tiebreaker rules.

gameRules.title: Game Rules
gameRules.submitDesc: All predictions must be submitted before the match starts.
gameRules.lockDesc: Once a match begins, your prediction is locked and cannot be changed.
gameRules.autoDesc: Points are calculated automatically when match results are finalized.

soloBracket.howItWorksDesc: Make predictions for any match to see simulated group standings and possible knockout paths. When you join a league, you can import these predictions!

groupBracket.complianceOkDetail: Top 8 third-placed teams are correctly assigned to their R32 slots, no team meets a same-group opponent before the final, and all eligibility constraints are respected.

knockoutBracket.completeGroupFirstDesc: Make predictions for all 72 group matches to see the knockout bracket with resolved teams from your standings.
knockoutBracket.confirmGroupStandingsDesc: Some groups have tied teams that need your manual ranking before knockout matches can be resolved:
knockoutBracket.completePreToUnlock: Complete previous round to unlock teams
knockoutBracket.completePrevStage: Complete and confirm the previous stage first
knockoutBracket.penaltyHint: Some matches have tied scores without penalty shootout results. Enter penalties to determine winners.
knockoutBracket.completeRemaining: Complete all {{count}} remaining prediction to confirm this phase.
knockoutBracket.completeRemainingPlural: Complete all {{count}} remaining predictions to confirm this phase.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Get answers to common questions or chat with our AI assistant
helpCenter.helperText: Ask about predictions, scoring, leagues, payments, or any other GOALPICK feature!

supportDialog.description: Describe your issue and our support team will get back to you as soon as possible.

supportDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe your issue in detail...
supportDialog.chatAttached: Your chat conversation will be attached to help our team understand your issue.
supportDialog.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields

gettingStarted.q1: How do I create an account?
gettingStarted.a1: Click "Sign Up" on the login page, enter your email and create a password. You'll receive a verification email - click the link to activate your account and start making predictions!
gettingStarted.q2: How do I join a league?
gettingStarted.a2: You can join a league in two ways: 1) Browse public leagues from the Leagues page and click "Join Now", or 2) Use an invite code shared by a friend - go to Leagues and click "Join with Invite Code".
gettingStarted.a3: Mock pick lets you make predictions without joining a league. It's perfect for casual players who want to track their predictions and see how they would have scored without competing for prizes.
gettingStarted.q4: Can I be in multiple leagues at once?
gettingStarted.a4: Yes! You can join as many leagues as you want. Each league has its own leaderboard and scoring rules, so you can compete with different groups of friends simultaneously.

predictions.a1: Predictions lock 5 minutes before each match kicks off. After this time, you cannot modify your prediction for that match. Make sure to submit your predictions before the deadline!
predictions.a2: Yes, you can edit predictions anytime before they lock. Predictions lock 5 minutes before each match kicks off, so make sure to submit yours in time!
predictions.q3: What happens if I forget to predict a match?
predictions.a3: If you don't submit a prediction before the match locks, you'll receive 0 points for that match. We recommend enabling notifications so you don't miss any deadlines!
predictions.q4: How do I predict knockout matches?
predictions.a4: Knockout match predictions become available after the previous round is complete. Once each phase finishes, you'll unlock the next round of matches to predict. This keeps things exciting throughout the tournament!
predictions.a5: For knockout matches that could go to penalties, you can optionally predict the penalty shootout result. The main score prediction should be the score at the end of extra time (before penalties).

scoring.a1: By default: Exact score prediction = 5 points, Correct outcome (win/draw) = 2 points, Wrong prediction = 0 points. League owners can customize these values.
scoring.a2: Knockout matches are worth more! Default multipliers: Group Stage = 1x, Round of 32 = 1.5x, Round of 16 = 2x, Quarter Final = 2.5x, Semi Final & 3rd Place = 3x, Final = 4x.
scoring.q3: Are there bonuses for knockout rounds?
scoring.a3: Yes! Points are multiplied in later stages. For example, correctly predicting a Final match earns more points than a Group Stage match. Each league can customize these multipliers.
scoring.q4: Can leagues have different scoring rules?
scoring.a4: Yes! League owners can customize exact score points, outcome points, stage multipliers, and position bonuses when creating their league.

leagues.q1: How do I create a league?
leagues.a1: Go to Leagues → Create League. Set a name, choose public or private, set entry fees (optional), and customize scoring rules. You'll get an invite code to share with friends.
leagues.q2: What's the difference between public and private leagues?
leagues.a2: Public leagues appear in the browse list and anyone can join. Private leagues require an invite code and won't show up in searches - perfect for competing with friends!
leagues.q3: How do entry fees and prize pools work?
leagues.a3: League owners can set an entry fee. The collected fees form the prize pool, which is distributed to top finishers based on the league's payout percentages (default: 70/20/10 for 1st/2nd/3rd).
leagues.a4: If enabled, the league owner pays for all platform fees upfront. Members can join for free (or just the entry fee). The owner can purchase prepaid licenses for members.
leagues.a5: Yes, you can leave a league at any time from the league detail page. Note that if you've paid an entry fee, you'll need to contact the league owner about refunds.

account.q1: How do I update my profile?
account.a1: Go to Profile from the navigation menu. You can update your display name, favorite team, country, and notification preferences.
account.q2: How do I change my password?
account.a2: Click "Forgot Password?" on the login page and enter your email. You'll receive a link to reset your password.
account.a3: We offer email and push notifications for match results, points updates, and standings changes. Enable/disable each type in your Profile settings.
account.q4: Can I change my email address?
account.a4: Currently, email addresses cannot be changed. If you need to use a different email, please contact support for assistance.

payments.q1: How do I pay the league entry fee?
payments.a1: When joining a league with an entry fee, you'll be redirected to our secure Stripe checkout. We accept all major credit cards.
payments.a2: A small platform fee helps cover hosting and development costs. The fee amount is displayed before you pay. Some leagues have "Owner Covers Fees" enabled, meaning you don't pay the platform fee.
payments.a3: Prizes are distributed at the end of the tournament based on final league standings. League owners are responsible for distributing prizes to winners.
payments.a4: Refund policies are set by individual league owners. For general platform issues, please contact support. We'll do our best to help resolve any payment problems.

technical.a1: GOALPICK works best on modern browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend keeping your browser updated for the best experience.
technical.a2: GOALPICK is a web app that works great on mobile browsers! Add it to your home screen for an app-like experience. No download required.
technical.q3: My predictions aren't saving - what should I do?
technical.a3: First, check your internet connection. If the problem persists, try refreshing the page. Make sure the match hasn't already locked. If issues continue, please contact support.
technical.q4: Why can't I see my points updating?
technical.a4: Points are calculated when a match is marked as finished. During live matches, you won't see point updates until the final whistle. Try refreshing the page after the match ends.
technical.a5: Try these steps: 1) Refresh the page, 2) Clear your browser cache, 3) Try a different browser, 4) Check if your browser extensions are interfering. If none of these work, contact support.

setup.title: Welcome to GoalPick!
setup.subtitle: Before we begin, choose your language and accept the terms to continue.
setup.termsPlaceholder:
[DRAFT — This is placeholder text for Terms & Conditions. It will be replaced with the final legal copy.]

1. You must be at least 18 years old to use this service.
2. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.
3. GoalPick reserves the right to modify these terms at any time.
4. All predictions are final once a match begins.
5. Prize distribution is subject to league rules set by the league owner.
6. GoalPick is not responsible for any losses incurred through the use of this platform.
7. Users must not engage in any fraudulent or abusive behavior.
8. GoalPick may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

GoalPick Privacy Policy:

1. We collect your email address, display name, and prediction data to provide our services.
2. Your data is stored securely and is not shared with third parties without your consent.
3. We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience.
4. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting support.
5. We may send you notifications about matches, scores, and league activity based on your preferences.
6. By using GoalPick, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in this policy.

pwa.iosShareHint: Look for the share icon in Safari's toolbar

header.title: Official Tournament Criteria
header.subtitle: International Football Tournament 2026 — Competition Regulations & Format

summary.title: Tournament Summary
summary.description: Key information about the 2026 international football tournament format and rules

groupStage.title: Group Stage Format
groupStage.intro: Each team plays 3 matches in the group stage (once against each team in their group).
groupStage.matchLength: All group stage matches consist of two 45-minute halves (90 minutes total). If a match ends in a draw, it remains a draw (no extra time in group stage).

advancement.title: Advancement to Knockout Stage
advancement.intro: 32 teams advance from the group stage to the knockout rounds:
advancement.top2: Top 2 teams from each of the 12 groups
advancement.bestThird: Best 8 third-place teams across all groups
advancement.tiebreakerNote: The 8 best third-placed teams are determined by comparing their group stage records using the same criteria as the tiebreaker rules.

knockout.title: Knockout Stage Bracket
knockout.intro: Single-elimination format from Round of 32 to the Final:

tiebreaker.title: Tiebreaker Criteria
tiebreaker.intro: When teams finish with the same points, the following criteria are applied in order:

step1.points: Points in matches between tied teams
step1.gd: Goal difference in matches between tied teams
step1.goals: Goals scored in matches between tied teams

step2.gd: Goal difference in all group matches
step2.goals: Goals scored in all group matches

extraTime.title: Extra Time & Penalties
extraTime.intro: In knockout matches, if the score is tied after 90 minutes:
extraTime.step1Desc: Two periods of 15 minutes each (30 min total)
extraTime.step2Desc: If still tied after extra time, kicks from the penalty mark determine the winner
extraTime.subNote: Note: Teams may use one additional substitution during extra time (6 total instead of 5).

fairPlay.title: Fair Play Scoring
fairPlay.intro: Fair play points are deducted for disciplinary offenses. Lower totals are better:

leagueMatches.subtitle: Make your predictions
leagueMatches.paymentRequiredDesc: Complete your payment to make predictions in this league.
leagueMatches.lockInfoPhase: All predictions for a phase lock when the first match of that phase begins. Once locked, your predictions become visible to other league members.
leagueMatches.lockInfoMatch: Each prediction locks when its match kicks off. Once locked, your predictions become visible to other league members.

randomDialog.title: Overwrite all predictions?
randomDialog.description: This will replace every prediction you've already made for this league with randomly generated scores. This action can't be undone — your existing picks will be lost.

landingPage.subhead: Forecast every match of the {{tournament}}, build private leagues with friends, and climb a leaderboard built for true football fans.
landingPage.edgeDesc: Earn points for exact scores, correct outcomes and group bonuses.

hero.title: Predict. Compete. Win.
hero.subtitle: Predict match scores for the 2026 football tournament, compete in leagues with friends, and climb the leaderboard to win.

signup.title: Join the Pool
signup.desc: Create your account to start predicting
signup.nicknameTip: This is the name other players will see on leaderboards and in leagues.
signup.passwordHint: Min. 6 characters. Mix letters, numbers & symbols for a stronger password.

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.desc: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send you a fresh reset link.
forgot.sentDesc: Check your inbox — we just sent a reset link. Click it within the next hour to set a new password.
